1.description: Existence with long-run consumption risks The figure plots regions of existence (green) and nonexistence (white) and regions in which no definite answer on existence can be given (black) for model (19). The model parameters are given by δψμρϕδ=0.998,ψ=1.5,μ=0.0015,σ¯=0.0078,ρx=0.979,ϕx=0.044⁠, and l0=0⁠.
